comparisonPolicy.verifiedSourceMeaning: sourceColorSentToBlend is the non-synthetic vec4f captured by the FOR-421 verified return-path instrumentation.
comparisonPolicy.coverageReferenceMeaning: coverageExpectedAlpha is read from BoundedStrokeCapJoinCoverageMaskGM alpha at the same selected pixel.
comparisonPolicy.sourceReferenceMeaning: expectedSourcePremulRgbaFloat is paintSourceRgba premultiplied by coverageExpectedAlpha.
comparisonPolicy.finalReferenceMeaning: referenceRgba is the Skia/reference bitmap pixel for the selected scene coordinate.
comparisonPolicy.boundedRecordPolicy: One record per selected pixel and sampled draw; no framebuffer dump or WGSL source dump is stored.
